name: grok-bitch
description: A Rick & Morty multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code, built on a deterministic safety cage. Offload mechanical, verifiable grunt work to grok (grok-build) — it runs caged (OS sandbox, hard resource caps, byte-snapshot guard+revert on protected paths, a verify gate) and hands back a structured JSON verdict; falls back to a caged Opus when grok is unavailable. Claude keeps the rigor; grok does the bitch work. Ships a skill (so Claude reaches for it automatically), a 20-strong persona cast of subagents (Rick the 300-IQ handler, Morty the grunt courier, Mr. Meeseeks, Jerry, Citadel Rick, Beth, Space Beth, Summer, Birdperson, Mr. Poopybutthole, Evil Morty the directed red-teamer, Randotron the seeded-chaos fuzzer, Council Rick the consensus-triangulator, Mr. President the release authority, Snowball the escalation reasoner, Dr. Xenon Bloom the architecture cartographer, Jessica the UX reviewer, Diane the archivist, Butter Robot the YAGNI gate, Noob-Noob the maintenance runner — each with show-accurate skills and a style-accurate model tier), three session modes (/rick-mode to become Rick, /adventure-mode to run a goal as a multi-agent Workflow, /family-mode for a standing ensemble) plus a darker /rick-mode variant (/detox, keeping the Toxic Rick half), and augmentations and one-shot commands (/auto-rick, /episode, /rick-git, /council, /cronenberg, /pickle-rick, /blips-n-chitz), and the grok-bitch CLI on PATH. The voice is paint; the rigor underneath is surgical — maniac in the prose, surgeon in the facts.
